svg.text: Figure 4. Residual gain errors and averaging laws
Residual gain error scales quadratically, while random-frame reconstructions average residual error down with frame count.

g.text: M4 random frame scaling at sigma_delta=0.05

svg.text: The main fitted laws supporting H2/H4: residual gain errors have near-quadratic scaling; random-frame correlation reconstructions improve with frame count;
